_comment: homepage.assets.json — complete asset manifest for my-theme/templates/home.html. All URLs and local paths are exactly as referenced in the source templates. Missing any of these will cause visual drift.

images.description: Primary Smuves brand logo — used in both Header.module and Footer.module
images.notes: override_inherited_src=true, suppress_company_name=true. Same file used in both header and footer.

images.description: Grayscale geometric mountain placeholder — default image used in all @hubspot/linked_image modules across the homepage
images.alt: Stock placeholder image with grayscale geometrical mountain landscape
images.notes: Replace with real content images in React. Preserve max-width:605px max-height:451px constraints.

images.description: Full-bleed background image for the Call to Action section
images.css_rule: background-image: url(...); background-position: center center; background-size: cover
images.notes: Used as CSS background-image on the dnd-section wrapper, not an tag. Cover + center position must be preserved.

images.description: Template preview screenshot — not rendered on the live page
images.notes: HubSpot Design Manager preview only — not used in React.

fonts.description: Primary body typeface — driven by HubSpot theme settings (theme.body_font). Actual font family is stored in the HubSpot portal, not in this repo.
fonts.notes: Export the font-family value from the HubSpot portal theme settings. Apply to: body, p, all default text.

fonts.description: Heading typefaces h1–h6 — each individually driven by theme variables
fonts.notes: Check portal theme settings to get exact font families and sizes.
Header CTA button: 16px, weight 700, color #fff (hardcoded in Header.module/module.css). CTA section button: theme-driven.

icons.description: Mobile hamburger — three horizontal <span> bars, no SVG
16×16px SVG check/badge icon inside the Hero module eyebrow pill
icons.notes: Rendered inline by Hero.module — not currently on the default homepage (Hero.module is not used by hero-banner.html). Extract from module.html if Hero module is deployed.

icons.description: 16×16px SVG checkmark icon for each checklist item in the Hero module
icons.notes: Rendered inline by Hero.module — not on default homepage unless Hero.module is active.

background_images.notes: Applied via inline style on the dnd-section element. Not an tag.

external_data_dependencies.notes: Navigation links (text + URLs) — stored in HubSpot portal menu. Must be re-created in Contentstack or hardcoded for React.
Footer link columns — all three columns use this same menu ID by default. Must be re-created in Contentstack.

javascript.description: Vanilla JS IIFE — mobile nav/lang/search toggles for original commented-out header. Not needed in React (replace with React state).
jQuery injected by HubSpot platform — used by Header.module/module.js for slideToggle. Replace with React state in migration.
